title: Vanilla Expanded and Enhanced
description: Makes the visuals of minecraft stunning, while not destroying the core gameplay, but instead, improving it with several QOL mods that are very customizeable, and a LOT of create mod addons.
body:
Makes the visuals of minecraft stunning, while not destroying the core gameplay, but instead, improving it with several QOL mods that are very customizeable, and several create mods to further expand on your creativity.

This modpack's main addons are :

- William Wyther's Expanded Ecosphere
- Create
- Create Clockwork
- Create Eureka!
- Amendments
- Naturalist
- JEI
- A lot of optimisation mods

Performance tests for this modpack were made on a GTX 1650, 16gb RAM, Intel i5-10400 2.90 GHZ processor.
PERFORMANCE TEST RESULTS :
- Shaders quality :
- Potato - 60+ fps No lagspikes
- Low - 60+ fps No lagspikes
- Medium - 60+ fps Minimal lagspikes when loading new chunks
- High - 55~ fps Minimal lagspikes when loading new chunks
- Ultra - 50~ fps Lagspikes when loading new chunks
(This modpack will likely not come out for forge, as many of the mods it depends on are fabric-only.)
